title: Slime
description: /slime command to find slime chunks without world seed
body:
This is a server-side mod. You do not need it installed on your client, and it will not work if not installed on the server. 

## Requires Fabric API

I made this for the small server I host with my friends. 

The purpose of this mod is to allow players to easily find slime chunks without the world seed.

This is done with one simple command: "/slime"

![image](https://i.imgur.com/8sQkExS.png)
